I just bored with aqueor x Ultra

**Is Mouchette Powerful:** She is an ok, A~B tier dps. She can clear content. She is not top tier or overpowered. She won't break records unless you invest heavily into her and whale for her and her wheel

**Stopping Point for Pulls:** E3, but OE is good. I don't recommend using her before E3

**Best Team:** Mouchette, Helot, Thais, Aigis. Aigis is a flex slot that can be swapped for Pickman, Faint, etc. depending on your needs

**Can I Use Her With Lotan/Gelot:** I don't recommend it as you will effectively have 2 dps on the team. A support that adds a damage multiplier to Mouchette, or adds defense or utility which Mouchette lacks, will be more effective than another dps

**Covenant:** Dreams of Medicine with Death Resist substats

**Wheels:** Crit, Death Resist, Strike wheels work best. Best in slot is her own wheel + Lily wheel. Lotan wheel, Blade of the Titan, etc. are fine

**Should I Pull Mouchette:** If you like her.

**Should I Pull Mouchette Wheel:** If you are prepared to invest heavily in her. There are other wheels that can substitute

for covenants

gmurphy, murphy, thais, aigis are all keyflare units so normally the best is life drain. since you can only have one life drain on a team, put it on murphy and make her the keyflare bot

for gmurphy: dreams of medicine is best as dps, but you can't buy it yet, so use crimson pulse

thais and aigis can use any supportive covenant such as deus ex machina or re-evolution, or you can put crimson pulse as well

aequor likes crimson pulse because tentacle crit is based on teamwide crit

i know the game is fairly popular, but dont see any videos or guides on it

lots of new players recently
you interact with the ui above your characters for realms other than chaos (they don't have one)
for specifically gmurphy aequor mechanics, changing stances has a 3 turn cooldown: white stance gives you a shield, red stance for more damage basically

caro accumulates hp in the oven each turn that you can press to heal yourself. when the bar hits 100% you get a baby that you can either use on characters for aliemus and crit rate, or let caro units devour it with their exalt for an extra effect
U REALLY want to get gmurphy 1 more dupe tho if she is going to be your main damage dealer

Hey guys, what covenants should I use?
What strong teams are people running?
lifedrain is a _really_ good cov, but its set bonus is team unique so you should really only run one of them per team. Probably dreams on gmurphy instead if you are trying to do damage with her.
a good and viable team using these

Mouchette, thais, aigis, ramona. You could also try out building around gmurphy + miryam if you like blue. You are likely early enough in the story that pretty much anything will work so you should try out different things to see what is fun for you. 

Game gives you free pulls for leveling characters to 60 so in the greater scheme of things you want to eventually build most of your roster out.
